case_title: KUNIO TAMASHIRO VS. PAMELA ZACHARIAS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAMASHIRO, KUNIO AS TO DEFENDANT ZACHARIAS, PAMELA DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
